info.title: Development Tools for Microsoft Dynamics 365 Business Central
info.description: Development tools for pipelines and automation of Dynamics 365 Business Central development processes

hookCapture.patchTarget: Parse-postfix (OK: Command.Parse, OK: Command.Parse, OK: CommandLineParser.Parse, OK: CommandLineParser.Parse, OK: ParseResult.Invoke, OK: ParseErrorAction.Invoke, OK: HelpAction.Invoke, OK: ParseResult.InvokeAsync, OK: RootCommand.ctor(String))

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information

options.name: --version
options.description: Show version information

commands.name: compile
commands.description: Compiles a package by invoking alc.exe with the specified arguments.

commands.name: compile
commands.description: Compile all projects in a workspace

options.name: --maxcpucount
options.description: Maximum number of concurrent compilations. Default is the number of processors.

options.name: --packagecachepath
options.description: Path to the package cache folder. [default: ]

options.name: --assemblyprobingpaths
options.description: Paths to probe for dependent assemblies.

options.name: --analyzers
options.description: Analyzers to run.

options.name: --features
options.description: Features to enable.

options.name: --generatereportlayout
options.description: Generate report layout. [default: False]

options.name: --define
options.description: Preprocessor symbols to define.

options.name: --ruleset
options.description: Path to the ruleset file.

options.name: --sourcerepositoryurl
options.description: Source repository URL for the workspace.

options.name: --sourcecommit
options.description: Source commit id for the workspace.

options.name: --loglevel
options.description: Logging level. [default: Normal]

options.name: --logdirectory
options.description: Directory to store compilation log files. If not specified, logs are written to workspace directory.

options.name: --outfolder
options.description: Output folder for compilation artifacts.

options.name: --customanalyzers
options.description: Paths to custom analyzer assemblies. Supports absolute paths, paths relative to the workspace directory, and well-known variables (e.g. ${AnalyzerFolder}/MyAnalyzer.dll).

arguments.name: folders
arguments.description: Folders to recursively search for AL projects (app.json)

commands.name: map
commands.description: Create markdown with mermaid dependency map from workspace

arguments.name: outputFile
arguments.description: Output markdown file path (optional, defaults to workspace-map.md)

commands.name: GetPackageManifest
commands.description: Get the manifest from a .app file.

commands.name: CreateSymbolPackage
commands.description: Creates a symbol package from a given application package.

arguments.name: targetPath
arguments.description: Path to output symbol only package file (*.app)

commands.name: GetLatestSupportedRuntimeVersion
commands.description: Get latest supported AL runtime version for a platform version

commands.name: IsSymbolOnly
commands.description: Checks if the given .app package is a symbol-only package.

commands.name: IsRuntimePackage
commands.description: Checks if the given .app package is a runtime package.

commands.name: launchmcpserver
commands.description: Launch an AL Model Context Protocol (MCP) server.

options.name: --port
options.description: Port number for the HTTP server. [default: 5000]

options.name: --transport
options.description: Transport mode: 'http' or 'stdio'. Defaults to 'stdio' when stdin is redirected, otherwise 'http'. [default: stdio]

options.name: --disableTelemetry
options.description: Disable telemetry collection. [default: False]

options.name: --telemetryLevel
options.description: Telemetry level: 'off', 'crash', 'error', or 'all' (default). [default: all]

options.name: --environment
options.description: Publish environment for endpoint selection: Production (default), Tie, ServicesTie. Internal use only. [default: Production]

options.name: --packagecachepath
options.description: Paths to the package cache folders.

options.name: --assemblyprobingpaths
options.description: Paths to probe for dependent assemblies.

options.name: --ruleset
options.description: Path to the ruleset file.

options.name: --outfolder
options.description: Output folder for compilation artifacts.

options.name: --codeanalyzers
options.description: Code analyzers to enable.

arguments.name: projects
arguments.description: AL project paths to load. Optional — projects can also be added later using the al_addproject tool.

commands.name: publishapp
commands.description: Publishes an AL package (.app file) to a Business Central server.

options.name: --project
options.description: AL project folder path. Used to locate the .app file if appPath is not specified.

options.name: --server
options.description: Server URL for on-premise deployment (e.g., 'http://localhost').

options.name: --serverInstance
options.description: Server instance name for on-premise deployment (e.g., 'BC').

options.name: --port
options.description: Port number for on-premise development service.

options.name: --environment
options.description: Publish environment for endpoint selection: Production (default), Tie, ServicesTie.

options.name: --environmentName
options.description: Environment name for cloud deployment (e.g., 'sandbox').

options.name: --environmentType
options.description: Environment type: 'OnPrem', 'Sandbox', or 'Production'.

options.name: --authentication
options.description: Authentication method: 'AAD' (default), 'Windows', or 'UserPassword'.

options.name: --tenant
options.description: Tenant ID for multi-tenant environments.

options.name: --schemaUpdateMode
options.description: Schema update mode: 'Synchronize' (default), 'ForceSync', or 'Recreate'.

options.name: --noCache
options.description: Force re-authentication (bypass cached tokens). [default: False]

options.name: --forceUpgrade
options.description: Force upgrade without requiring version change. [default: False]

options.name: --applicationFamily
options.description: Application family for the cloud server.

options.name: --useModernTieAuthUrl
options.description: Use the modern Tie/ServicesTie Entra ID authority URL (login.microsoftonline-ppe.com) instead of legacy (login.windows-ppe.net). [default: False]

arguments.name: appPath
arguments.description: Path to the .app file to publish. If not specified, searches for .app in current directory.

commands.name: login
commands.description: Perform an interactive login and cache tokens locally for subsequent operations.

options.name: --tenant
options.description: Tenant to authenticate against (domain or GUID). Defaults to 'common'.

options.name: --environment
options.description: Publish environment for endpoint selection: Production (default), Tie, ServicesTie.

options.name: --environmentType
options.description: Environment type: Sandbox (default) or Production.

options.name: --environmentName
options.description: Environment name (e.g., 'sandbox', 'production').

options.name: --applicationFamily
options.description: Application family for the cloud server (optional).

options.name: --usernameHint
options.description: Optional username hint for selecting an account.

options.name: --deviceCode
options.description: Use device code flow instead of interactive browser login. [default: False]

options.name: --noCache
options.description: Clear token cache before login. [default: False]

options.name: --useModernTieAuthUrl
options.description: Use the modern Tie/ServicesTie Entra ID authority URL (login.microsoftonline-ppe.com) instead of legacy (login.windows-ppe.net). [default: False]
